client_id.description: Intuit Developer app Client ID, obtained from the app's Keys tab. Used only in the token-refresh request form; never logged.

client_secret.description: Intuit Developer app Client Secret, obtained from the app's Keys tab. Used only in the token-refresh request form; never logged.

refresh_token.description: Long-lived QuickBooks OAuth 2.0 refresh token (valid up to ~100 days), exchanged for a short-lived access token at token_url; never logged. The 3-legged consent/acquisition dance is out of scope for this connector (credentials layer already owns it).

realm_id.description: QuickBooks company (Realm) ID that scopes every Query API request. Treated as secret-adjacent (identifies a specific company) and validated as a path-safe segment (no '/', '?', '#', or '..').

base_url.description: QuickBooks Online Accounting API base URL override for tests or proxies. Use https://sandbox-quickbooks.api.intuit.com for a sandbox company.

token_url.description: Intuit OAuth 2.0 token endpoint override. MUST be https in production; the hook fails closed on a non-https or unparseable value to prevent exfiltrating the refresh token/client secret to an attacker-chosen endpoint.

page_size.description: Records per page (1-1000, Query API MAXRESULTS).

max_pages.description: Optional hard cap on the number of pages read per stream, consumed by hooks/quickbooks/hooks.go's StreamHook. Permissive parse: empty, "all", or "unlimited" means unbounded; a positive integer string caps the page count at that value.

sandbox.description: Documents whether this realm is a sandbox company (informational only in this pass; base_url is the operative environment switch -- see Known limits).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound for the earliest record to replicate. Not wired as a server-side incremental filter this pass (see Known limits) -- retained as forward-compatible config surface, matching legacy's own unused field.
